subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by the heaven of Thy bounty, and the ocean of Thy bestowals, and by the Sun that hath shone forth from the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بسماء جودک و بحر عطائک و الشمس التی اشرقت من افق
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for prosperity, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
